arithmetic: exact integer/GF(2) except explicitly reported floating residuals

empirical_bridge.interpretation: Calibration and likelihood contracts only; no external data fit is claimed.

finite_observer_limit.boundary: Finite-observer limit closure only; no differentiable continuum, Lorentzian metric, physical light cone, or empirical cosmology is claimed.

markov_chain.interpretation: The binomial Hamming marginal follows from uniform occupancy; it is not ASH-specific evidence.

observer_commitment.boundary: Finite observer-relative commitment and branch-separation workbench only; no collapse claim, no Born-rule proof, no unitary Hilbert-space dynamics, no unit-bearing spacetime bridge, no CMB/matter-spectrum solver, and no empirical cosmology validation.

physics.interpretation: Finite-observer stochastic physics layer; not an observational cosmology claim.

prediction_ledger.interpretation: Prediction-lock mechanics are implemented; no repository prediction is locked by this example.

standard_baseline.interpretation: Standard-baseline comparison mechanics only; not an ASH-derived cosmology limit.

unit_bridge.boundary: Synthetic finite-observer unit bridge only; no empirical cosmology, continuum metric, FRW limit, or external likelihood.
